qa_decisions.data_store: JSONL canonical write + SQLite read mirror at data/tdms.db
qa_decisions.web_refresh: Manual button, no auto-sync, no Firebase
qa_decisions.single_source: MASTER_DEBT houses everything, schema may expand
qa_decisions.prod_support: Works in both dev and production builds
qa_decisions.web_capabilities: UBER — maximum power, sorting, filtering, handoff to CLI
qa_decisions.synergies: Cross-tab opportunities between debt and other dev dashboard tabs
qa_decisions.verification: 3 dedicated verification agents + CL at every phase
